message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should have a star of 3 and should be in the moderate price range
The hotel should include free parking and should be in the centre
If there is no such hotel, how about one that is in the west
Once you find the hotel you want to book it for 1 people and 2 nights starting from monday
If the booking fails how about 1 nights
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a restaurant. The restaurant should be in the same price range as the hotel and should serve english food
The restaurant should be in the same area as the hotel
If there is no such restaurant, how about one that serves indian food
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for the same group of people at 12:30 on the same day
Make sure you get the reference number
